checks.summary: dry-run produces a P4 spec lock payload and writes no control lock

checks.command:
PYTHONPATH=repository/src python3 - <<'PY'
import hashlib, json
from pathlib import Path
from drd_harness.validators.spec_validator import compute_candidate_subject_hash
root = Path('.')
bundle_path = root / 'build_program/phases/P4/candidates/P4-SPEC-LOCK-CREATION-READINESS/SPEC_LOCK_INPUT_BUNDLE.json'
bundle = json.loads(bundle_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
for item in bundle['approved_spec_inputs']:
    spec_part = item['spec_part']
    candidate_dir = root / 'build_program' / 'phases' / 'P4' / 'candidates' / spec_part
    manifest = json.loads((candidate_dir / 'CANDIDATE_MANIFEST.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    subject_hash = compute_candidate_subject_hash(candidate_dir, manifest['generated_outputs'])
    assert subject_hash == item['subject_hash'], (spec_part, subject_hash, item['subject_hash'])
    assert manifest['approval_state'] == 'APPROVED_BY_HUMAN', spec_part
    review_path = candidate_dir / manifest['review_decision']
    review_bytes = review_path.read_bytes()
    review_hash = hashlib.sha256(review_bytes).hexdigest()
    review = json.loads(review_bytes)
    assert review_hash == item['review_decision_file_hash'], (spec_part, review_hash, item['review_decision_file_hash'])
    assert review['decision'] == 'APPROVED', spec_part
    assert review['subject_hash'] == subject_hash, spec_part
    assert review['decision_id'] == item['review_decision_id'], spec_part
print('PASS')
PY
checks.summary: approved P4 spec input subject hashes and review decision hashes are bound in SPEC_LOCK_INPUT_BUNDLE.json

checks.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
path = Path('control/locks/P4_SPEC_LOCK.json')
assert not path.exists(), f'{path} already exists'
print('PASS')
PY
checks.summary: canonical P4 spec lock output path is available and is not written by readiness
